# liter-llm

> Universal LLM API client. One Rust core, 14 native language bindings, 143 runtime providers, an OpenAI-compatible proxy, and a built-in MCP server.

liter-llm gives a single client surface — chat, streaming, tools, structured outputs, embeddings, rerank, images, speech, transcription, OCR, search, files, batches, moderation — across 143 runtime LLM providers. It ships as a compiled Rust core with native bindings for Rust, Python, TypeScript, Go, Java, Kotlin Android, C#, Ruby, PHP, Elixir, Dart, Swift, Zig, and WebAssembly, plus a C FFI surface and a CLI binary that exposes an OpenAI-compatible proxy server and a Model Context Protocol server.

## Get Started

- [Installation](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/getting-started/installation/): Install for any of the 14 supported languages or pull the Docker image
- [Configuration](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/usage/configuration/): API keys, timeouts, retries, base-URL overrides

## Guides — Core

- [Chat & Streaming](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/usage/chat/): Chat completions, streaming, tool calls, structured outputs
- [Embeddings & Rerank](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/usage/embeddings/): Embedding generation and result reranking
- [Media](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/usage/media/): Image generation, text-to-speech, transcription
- [Search & OCR](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/usage/search-ocr/): Web search and document OCR endpoints
- [Files & Batches](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/usage/files/): File uploads, batch jobs, async exchanges

## Guides — Advanced

- [Authentication](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/usage/authentication/): Azure AD, AWS Bedrock SigV4 + STS/IRSA, Vertex AI service-accounts, GitHub Copilot
- [Fallback & Routing](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/usage/fallback-routing/): Round-robin, weighted, latency-based, cost-based, ordered-fallback
- [Local LLMs](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/usage/local-llms/): Ollama, llama.cpp, and other OpenAI-compatible local runtimes
- [Error Handling](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/usage/error-handling/): Error taxonomy, retries, and recovery patterns
- [Observability](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/usage/observability/): Tracing, OpenTelemetry, cost tracking

## Deployment

- [Proxy Server](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/server/proxy-server/): OpenAI-compatible HTTP gateway with virtual keys and budgets
- [Proxy Configuration](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/server/proxy-configuration/): TOML schema for routes, fallbacks, rate limits
- [MCP Server](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/server/mcp-server/): Model Context Protocol tool server
- [MCP & IDE Integration](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/usage/mcp-integration/): VS Code, Claude Desktop, Cursor, Zed

## Concepts

- [Architecture](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/concepts/architecture/): Rust core, Tower middleware, binding layer, proxy server
- [Feature Flags](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/concepts/feature-flags/): Cargo features (`native-http`, `wasm-http`, `tower`, `otel`, `tokenizer`, etc.)
- [Tokenizer](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/concepts/tokenizer/): Token counting model
- [Cost Estimation](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/concepts/cost-estimation/): Pre-call and post-call cost computation

## Reference

- [Rust API](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-rust/)
- [Python API](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-python/)
- [TypeScript / Node API](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-typescript/)
- [Go API](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-go/)
- [Java API](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-java/)
- [Kotlin Android API](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-kotlin-android/)
- [C# API](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-csharp/)
- [Ruby API](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-ruby/)
- [PHP API](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-php/)
- [Elixir API](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-elixir/)
- [Dart API](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-dart/)
- [Swift API](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-swift/)
- [Zig API](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-zig/)
- [WebAssembly API](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-wasm/)
- [C / FFI](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-c/)
- [Providers](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/providers/): All 143 runtime providers with model prefixes
- [Configuration](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/reference/configuration/)
- [Types](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/reference/types/)
- [Errors](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/reference/errors/)

## Kreuzberg Ecosystem

- [Kreuzberg](https://docs.kreuzberg.dev): Document intelligence: text, tables, metadata from 91+ formats with optional OCR
- [Kreuzberg Cloud](https://docs.kreuzberg.cloud): Managed extraction API with SDKs, dashboards, and observability
- [kreuzcrawl](https://docs.kreuzcrawl.kreuzberg.dev): Web crawling and scraping with HTML to Markdown and headless-Chrome fallback
- [html-to-markdown](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev): Fast, lossless HTML to Markdown engine
- [tree-sitter-language-pack](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev): Tree-sitter grammars and code-intelligence primitives

## More

- [Contributing](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/contributing/): Contribution guidelines and development setup
- [Changelog](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/CHANGELOG/): Release notes and version history
